title: ReInventory Hotswap (continuation of Inventory Hotswap)
description: Hotswap inventory slots or entire hotbars at ease!
body:
English

❔ About

ReInventory Hotswap is a continuation of Inventory Hotswap (by Areuthreateningme) for newer versions of Minecraft. It is entirely configurable through it's auto reloaded config file provided by its required dependency, Unnamed Common Library (by 𝓓iscorde (myself)).

📦 Features

  • Swap single slots or whole hotbars
  • Three different modes to render above the hotbar
  • Instant swap or on keybind release
  • And a few more!
Enjoy 🙂
